texto: You will see by this that no man should be judged by another here in this life, for the good or evil he has done. Deeds may be properly judged, whether they are good or bad, but not men.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Clifton Wolters sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “You will see by this that no man should be judged by another here in this life, for the good or e…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, theology, judged, útil em momentos de reflexao.
